name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Universal City's ACE Cash Express at 1105 Pat Booker Rd offers payday loans, title loans, and quick cash financial solutions with fast approvals.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates at 1105 Pat Booker Rd in Universal City, TX, a convenient standalone storefront serving the local community. This location provides Universal City residents with extended hours to fit busy schedules, open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM. The branch is closed Sundays.

At this Universal City location, you can access payday loans, title loans, and other short-term financial products designed for immediate cash needs. Call +1 210-658-6037 to discuss your options or visit in person during business hours. The staff can walk you through application requirements and help you find the right solution tailored to your situation.

Universal City residents using this ACE Cash Express branch should bring a valid ID, recent pay stub, and banking information when visiting. Payday and title loans work best for short-term emergencies when you need cash quickly between paychecks.
address: 1105 Pat Booker Rd, Universal City, TX 78148

company_info.headquarters: 1105 Pat Booker Rd, Universal City, TX 78148

pros: Multiple service types available: installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services
Online loan options in addition to in-store services for added convenience
Same-day or next-day funding advertised for emergency cash needs
Established multi-location network with physical store presence for face-to-face service
Dedicated customer service teams with separate phone lines for online and general inquiries
State-specific compliance measures including California Notice at Collection disclosures
Business services offered in addition to consumer products
cons: Website infrastructure issues with multiple 404 errors on location-specific pages, limiting ability to verify services
Service availability is state-dependent with unclear transparency about which products work in which locations
Limited publicly available information about rates, terms, and APRs on the accessible website pages
Physical store network may not be comprehensive nationwide, limiting accessibility for many consumers
Recent store closures (Hurricane Ida reference) suggest potential operational disruptions
best_for: Consumers in Colorado seeking same-day or next-day emergency cash with title or collateral-based options
People needing check cashing, money transfers, or bill payment services at physical locations
Individuals requiring tax preparation services bundled with emergency lending options
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in states where their services are available who need quick emergency cash, title-based loans, or check cashing services and prefer in-person transactions or online access. Primary caveat: significant website functionality issues and unclear state-by-state service availability mean consumers must call or visit in person to verify if specific products are offered in their location.
services: Credit cards or stored value products (referenced as 'Cards')
meta_description: Universal City, TX - ACE Cash Express at 1105 Pat Booker Rd provides quick payday and title loans with fast approvals.
